name: get_sites
full_help:
get_sites

Description: 
Get a list of Sites

Syntax: 
get_sites  [-regexp] [-filter <arg>] [-nocase] [-range <args>]
           [-of_objects <args>] [-quiet] [-verbose] [<patterns>]

Returns: 
list of site objects

Usage: 
  Name           Description
  --------------------------
  [-regexp]      Patterns are full regular expressions
  [-filter]      Filter list with expression
  [-nocase]      Perform case-insensitive matching. (valid only when -regexp 
                 specified)
  [-range]       Match site names which fall into the range.  Range is 
                 defined by exactly two site names.
  [-of_objects]  Get the sites of slrs, tiles, bels, site_pins, package_pins,
                 ports, pblocks, nets, site_types, io_banks, cells, 
                 clock_regions or drc_violation
  [-quiet]       Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]     Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<patterns>]   Match site names against patterns. Bonded sites will also 
                 match on package pin names.
                 Default: *

Categories: 
Device, XDC, Object
